data.title: Saks Global Enters into Restructuring Support Agreement with Its Capital Partners
data.description: A prominent luxury retailer, Saks Global Enterprises LLC, has successfully obtained $500 million in exit financing. This move indicates the company's imminent emergence from Chapter 11, anticipated to occur this summer. Saks Global, a renowned multi-brand luxury retail entity, shared this development today.
SPOT SILVER DROPS 7% TO $69.86/OZ

data.title: Vantagepoint AI Honors the Life and Legacy of John J. Murphy
data.description: President Lane Mendelsohn of Vantagepoint AI commemorates the enduring friendship between his father, Louis Mendelsohn, and Murphy with a special tribute page on VantagePointSoftware.com. The tribute marks their decades-long bond. This announcement was made on April 2, 2026, in Wesley Chapel, Florida. Vantagepoint AI is recognized as a leading company in artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: International Tower Hill Mines Announces the Appointment of Andrew Cole to the ITH Board of Directors
data.description: Yesterday, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. (TSX: ITH) (NYSE American: THM) appointed Mr. Andrew Cole to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. With over 35 years of experience, Mr. Cole joins the company to contribute his expertise.

data.title: TMS INTERNATIONAL TO MARK 100TH ANNIVERSARY IN 2026
data.description: Founded in the thriving decade of the Roaring Twenties, TMS International emerged as a key player in the industrial sector. Fast forward a hundred years later, TMS stands as a prominent global entity in outsourced industrial services. The company continues to flourish in a landscape marked by innovation and growth.

data.title: Globo Transitions Primary Distribution to SRT over Managed IP Infrastructure with Synamedia
data.description: On April 2, 2026, a prominent video software company, Synamedia, revealed that Globo, the biggest commercial media conglomerate in Latin America, has shifted its main content distribution to Secure Reliable Transport (SRT) using a fully IP-based managed platform. This move signifies Globo's commitment to adopting advanced technologies for efficient content delivery.

data.title: Media Alert from ClassDojo for Districts: New ClassDojo + Canva Integration Helps Districts Control School Communications at Scale
data.description: In a recent webinar lasting 60 minutes, ClassDojo and Canva for Education collaborated to introduce a unique native integration designed for Districts. This integration offers the ability to create, oversee, and distribute consistent communications within every school. Tailored for K-12 education, this integration facilitates the connection between different entities, effectively streamlining the process.

data.title: Cash App Breaks New Ground as First to Enable Pay-Over-Time for P2P Money Transfers
data.description: Cash App, based in Oakland, California, has introduced a unique feature enabling customers to convert peer-to-peer (P2P) money transfers into installment plans. This makes it the first major U.S. finance app to offer pay-over-time flexibility for everyday money transfers. Users can now divide the expenses of P2P payments - such as splitting utilities or sending money to family - over a period of time. This feature provides customers with increased control over their finances.

data.title: Supplier.io Acquires TealBook, Connecting Supplier Intelligence and Enterprise Data Management
data.description: In Chicago, the prominent supplier intelligence provider, Supplier.io, revealed the procurement of TealBook, a dependable supplier data platform aimed at remedying vendor master data issues on a large scale. This strategic move aligns with the introduction of Atlas, a fresh vendor master data management solution by Supplier.io. The current state of vendor data is described as disorganized, replicated, and unreliable, resulting in substantial financial losses for businesses, estimated to be in the millions annually due to duplicate payments and missed discounts.

data.title: Nintendo Download: Meating Agenda
data.description: This week in Redmond, Washington, the Nintendo Download features new content including the game "South of Midnight Weaver’s Edition" for Nintendo Switch. Players will dive into a mesmerizing third person action-adventure experience exploring Southern folklore in a dark and fantastical setting. The protagonist, Hazel, transforms into a Weaver after a calamity, gaining mystical powers to mend shattered connections and souls. This game offers an immersive journey through the American Deep South.

data.title: ArcBest Announces Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: ArkBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, a conference call will take place at 9:30 a.m. ET (8:30 a.m. CT) on the same day, where company executives will discuss these results. Interested individuals can participate by dialing (800) 715-9871 and using conference ID 6423434. Additionally, a live webcast will be accessible on ArcBest’s website at arcb.com. A replay of the call will also be accessible for those who miss the live discussion.

data.title: Modern Wealth Enters Florida Market With 20th Acquisition to Date
data.description: Monterey, California-based Modern Wealth Management (Modern Wealth) has revealed an asset purchase agreement with Legacy Wealth Management (Legacy), a South Florida advisory firm overseeing around $1.2 billion in client assets. Legacy, previously affiliated with LPL Financial, has now transitioned as part of this deal. Modern Wealth was established as a registered investment advisory (RIA) firm aiming to cater to the changing needs of financial professionals and their clients.

data.title: What's Going On With Bitmine Stock Thursday?
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (BMNR) experienced a decline in premarket trading on Thursday, in line with the overall negative sentiment in markets. Nasdaq futures dropped by 1.89% and S&P 500 futures by 1.49%. The geopolitical tension stemming from President Trump's announcement about the continuation of the U.S. military campaign against Iran led to a downturn in leading cryptocurrencies. Ethereum (ETH) fell below $2,100 post the statement. Bitmine currently holds a significant amount of 4,732,082 ETH tokens, exposing it to the volatile market conditions. For more details, check out Benzinga.com.

data.title: GoSpotCheck by FORM Earns Global Recognition for Results-Driven Artificial Intelligence
data.description: Recognizing companies that have advanced from reactive intelligence to autonomous execution, FORM has been honored with the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award in Boston on April 2, 2026. FORM is a top provider of mobile task management and AI-driven retail execution solutions. This award highlights their achievements in the field and emphasizes their evolution towards autonomous decision-making.

data.title: PLUS3 IT SYSTEMS NAMED A 2026 TOP EMPLOYER FOR INTERNS
data.description: Plus3 IT Systems, LLC revealed on April 2, 2026, that it was chosen to receive the "Top Employer for Interns" award for 2026 by the State Council of Higher Education for Virginia (SCHEV). This accolade showcases companies in Virginia that excel in providing opportunities for interns.

data.title: Quhuo Limited Announces Nasdaq Delisting Determination
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Quhuo Limited, listed on Nasdaq as QH, revealed that it obtained a Staff Delisting Determination Letter from the Listing Qualifications Department on March 27, 2026. Quhuo is a company registered in the Cayman Islands.
ITALY SOCCER FEDERATION CHIEF RESIGNS AFTER WORLD CUP QUALIFICATION FAILURE
Viridien has released its 2025 Universal Registration Document, detailing important information for investors.

data.title: New National Construction Safety Study: Small Contractors Improving Safety but Gaps Remain in Preconstruction Planning, Technology and Mental Health Support
data.description: A recent study conducted in 2026 in Boston revealed that safety conditions in the construction industry are on the rise. The improvement is primarily driven by small contractors. However, deficiencies persist in areas such as effective planning, adoption of technology, and mental health support for workers. This indicates a positive trend in safety measures within the industry but underscores the need for continued efforts to address these remaining challenges.

data.title: From Lab Fiber to Luxury Fabric: Kraig Biocraft Laboratories Targets Apparel First with Engineered Spider Silk
data.description: Kraig Labs, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB on the OTCQB market, is a biotechnology firm that operates at the crossroads of genetic engineering, materials science, and textile production.
